name: eresus-php-audit
description: Deep PHP-specific security audit skill covering injection, deserialization, file operations, auth bypass, POP chain discovery, and CMS-specific patterns. Trigger when auditing PHP code: "audit this PHP app", "find PHP security issues", "check Laravel/WordPress for vulnerabilities", "PHP SAST review", "check for PHP deserialization", "review this WordPress plugin". Includes scripts/rules.json for programmatic rule lookup.
